properties.displayName: App Service apps that use Java should use a supported Java Version
properties.description: Periodically, newer versions are released for Java software either due to security flaws or to include additional functionality. Using the a supported Java version for App Service apps is recommended in order to take advantage of security fixes, if any, and/or new functionalities of the latest version. This policy only applies to Linux apps. This policy requires you to specify a Java version that meets your requirements.

metadata.description: Enable or disable the execution of the policy
Specify a supported Java version for App Service
